title: stachys malacophylla
intro: Stachys malacophylla, also known as lamb's ear or woolly hedgenettle, is a perennial herb in the mint family native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is rich in flavonoids, terpenoids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Stachys malacophylla include relief from digestive issues, sore throats, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce anxiety. Herbal preparations of Stachys malacophylla can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
